name: water-formation_reaction_energy
prompt: Run the reaction-energy task for the reaction 2 H2 + O2 -> 2 H2O using the PM7 (mopac) method in the gas phase, in single-point mode. Each species is passed via --reactant/--product with its stoichiometric coefficient (and charge/mult where needed). Report the reaction energy delta_E in kcal/mol as the headline value, state the method used, and surface any warnings the calculation produced about PM7 parameter coverage. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
